about.title: About Me
about.description: Born into the world of tech, I found my place there. What matters most to me today is the recognition of my work and my efforts. I love innovation and easily get passionate about new things. I notably practice bodybuilding, a discipline that taught me rigor and method, both in practice and in theory and planning. Today, I'm looking to take a deeper interest in the world of finance.

job1.title: Software Developer
job1.description: Created my software development micro-business. Development of websites, applications and custom solutions for clients.

job2.title: Treasurer of BDE Binharry
job2.description: Elected treasurer of the Binharry Student Council. Budget management, expense tracking and financial organization of the association's events.

edu1.title: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science
edu1.description: 3-year program in software development. Learning modern technologies, project management and application development.

edu2.title: High School Diploma with Honors
edu2.description: Obtained high school diploma with honors. Specialties in Computer Science (NSI) and Mathematics.

edu3.title: SNEE Registration
edu3.description: Obtained the national student-entrepreneur status, allowing to develop an entrepreneurial project alongside studies with dedicated support.
